rationale: This is a bus-jam/sort puzzle satisfaction hook with a calm pastel blue palette and stylus-driven puzzle mechanics — fundamentally mismatched with Crowd City's high-energy, bright primary-color swarm/chase action and tap-and-run controls. The "relaxing" emotional pitch directly conflicts with Crowd City's competitive timer-pressure loop, and a hand-with-stylus puzzle demo would mislead installers and tank D1 retention. Only thin overlap is the broad casual audience; do not greenlight this archetype for Crowd City UA.
